temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:  const generateBurndownData = (sprintTasks: any[]) => {

temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:    const data = [];
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:    let remaining = totalSP;
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i <= 10; i++) {
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:      if (i > 0) remaining -= Math.floor(Math.random() * (totalSP / 10));
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:      if (remaining < 0) remaining = 0;
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:      data.push({
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:        day: `Día ${i}`,
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:        ideal: totalSP - (totalSP / 10) * i,
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:        actual: i <= 5 ? remaining : null
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:      });
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:    return data;
temp_repo/src/components/SprintTable.tsx:  };

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:export const SkillRadarView: React.FC<SkillRadarViewProps> = ({ stats, hasReference, isDarkMode }) => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const size = 400;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const center = size / 2;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const radius = size * 0.4;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const angleStep = (Math.PI * 2) / stats.length;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const getPoint = (value: number, index: number) => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:    const r = (value / 100) * radius;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:    const angle = index * angleStep - Math.PI / 2;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:    return {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:      x: center + r * Math.cos(angle),
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:      y: center + r * Math.sin(angle)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:    };
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const refPoints = stats.map((s, i) => getPoint(s.referenceValue, i));
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const userPath = userPoints.map(p => `${p.x},${p.y}`).join(' ');
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  const refPath = refPoints.map(p => `${p.x},${p.y}`).join(' ');
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:  return (
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:          {/* Background circles */}

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:              key={i}
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:              cx={center}

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:              r={radius * scale}

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:            />
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SkillRadarView.tsx:          ))}

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:interface SharedBarsProps {

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:export function SharedBars({ users, activeCategories, isDarkMode }: SharedBarsProps) {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:  const sharedSkills = React.useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:    if (users.length === 0) return [];
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:    const skillCounts = new Map<string, { skillName: string; type: string; count: number; avgLevel: number }>();
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:    users.forEach(user => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:      user.skillRatings?.forEach(us => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        if (activeCategories.includes(us.type as SkillCategory)) {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:          if (!skillCounts.has(us.name)) {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:            skillCounts.set(us.name, { skillName: us.name, type: us.type, count: 0, avgLevel: 0 });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:          }
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:          const entry = skillCounts.get(us.name)!;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:          entry.count++;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:          entry.avgLevel += us.value;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        }
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:      });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:    return Array.from(skillCounts.values())
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:      .map(s => ({
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        ...s,
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        skill: { name: s.skillName, category: s.type },
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        avgLevel: s.avgLevel / s.count,
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        percentage: (s.count / users.length) * 100
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:      }))
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count || b.avgLevel - a.avgLevel)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:      .slice(0, 8);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:  }, [users, activeCategories]);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:  return (

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:    }`}>

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        }`}>

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/SharedBars.tsx:        </span>

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:import * as d3 from 'd3';
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:import { SkillMapUser, SkillCategory } from '../../types/skills';
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:import { SKILL_CATEGORIES } from '../../constants/skills';
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:interface RadarChartProps {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  users: SkillMapUser[];
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  activeCategories: SkillCategory[];
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  isDarkMode: boolean;

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:export function RadarChart({ users, activeCategories, isDarkMode }: RadarChartProps) {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    if (!svgRef.current || users.length === 0) return;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const width = 800;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const height = 600;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const svg = d3.select(svgRef.current);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    svg.selectAll('*').remove();
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const g = svg.append('g').attr('transform', `translate(${width / 2}, ${height / 2})`);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    // Zoom behavior
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const zoom = d3.zoom<SVGSVGElement, unknown>()
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .scaleExtent([0.5, 5])
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .on('zoom', (event) => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        g.attr('transform', `translate(${width / 2 + event.transform.x}, ${height / 2 + event.transform.y}) scale(${event.transform.k})`);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    svg.call(zoom);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    // Filter categories that have at least one skill
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const categories = SKILL_CATEGORIES.filter(c => activeCategories.includes(c.id as SkillCategory));
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const angleSlice = (Math.PI * 2) / categories.length;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const radius = 200;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    // Calculate category scores for each user
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const userScores = users.map(user => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      const scores = categories.map(cat => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        const catSkills = (user.skillRatings || []).filter(us => us.type === cat.id);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        const totalLevel = catSkills.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.value, 0);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        // Normalize score to 0-3 range for the radar chart (assuming max 300 per category)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        return Math.min(3, totalLevel / 100);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      return { ...user, scores };
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    // Draw axes
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const axis = g.selectAll('.axis')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .data(categories)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .enter()
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .append('g')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('class', 'axis');
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    axis.append('line')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('x1', 0)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('y1', 0)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('x2', (d, i) => radius * Math.cos(angleSlice * i - Math.PI / 2))
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('y2', (d, i) => radius * Math.sin(angleSlice * i - Math.PI / 2))
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('stroke', isDarkMode ? '#444' : '#ccc')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('stroke-width', 1);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    axis.append('text')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('x', (d, i) => (radius + 20) * Math.cos(angleSlice * i - Math.PI / 2))
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('y', (d, i) => (radius + 20) * Math.sin(angleSlice * i - Math.PI / 2))
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('fill', d => d.color)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('font-size', '10px')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .text(d => d.name);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    // Draw radar areas
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    const radarLine = d3.lineRadial<number>()
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .radius(d => (d / 3) * radius)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .angle((d, i) => i * angleSlice)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      .curve(d3.curveLinearClosed);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    userScores.forEach(user => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      g.append('path')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        .datum(user.scores)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        .attr('d', radarLine)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        .attr('fill', user.color)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        .attr('fill-opacity', 0.1)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        .attr('stroke', user.color)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:        .attr('stroke-width', 2);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  }, [users, activeCategories, isDarkMode]);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:  return (
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:    <svg 
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      ref={svgRef} 
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      viewBox="0 0 800 600"
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/RadarChart.tsx:      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:export function VennDiagram({ users, activeCategories, isDarkMode }: VennDiagramProps) {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    if (!svgRef.current || users.length === 0) return;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const width = 800;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const height = 600;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const svg = d3.select(svgRef.current);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    svg.selectAll('*').remove();
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const g = svg.append('g');
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    // Zoom behavior
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const zoom = d3.zoom<SVGSVGElement, unknown>()
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .scaleExtent([0.5, 5])
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .on('zoom', (event) => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        g.attr('transform', event.transform);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    svg.call(zoom);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    // Calculate student circle positions
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const radius = 150;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const centerX = width / 2;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const centerY = height / 2;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const studentCircles = users.map((user, i) => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      const angle = (i / users.length) * 2 * Math.PI - Math.PI / 2;
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      return {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        ...user,
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        x: centerX + radius * Math.cos(angle),
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        y: centerY + radius * Math.sin(angle),
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        r: 180
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      };
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    // Draw student circles
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    g.selectAll('.student-circle')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .data(studentCircles)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .enter()
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .append('circle')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('class', 'student-circle')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('cx', d => d.x)

temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('r', d => d.r)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('fill', 'none')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('stroke', d => d.color)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('stroke-width', 2)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('stroke-opacity', 0.3);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    // Draw student labels
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    g.selectAll('.student-label')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .data(studentCircles)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .enter()
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .append('text')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('class', 'student-label')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('x', d => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        const angle = Math.atan2(d.y - centerY, d.x - centerX);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        return d.x + (d.r + 20) * Math.cos(angle);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      })
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('y', d => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        const angle = Math.atan2(d.y - centerY, d.x - centerX);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        return d.y + (d.r + 20) * Math.sin(angle);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      })
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('fill', d => d.color)
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('font-size', '12px')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      .text(d => d.firstName);
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    // Collect all skills and their owners
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    const allSkillsMap = new Map<string, { skillName: string; type: string; owners: string[]; level: number }>();
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:    users.forEach(user => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:      user.skillRatings?.forEach(us => {
temp_repo/src/components/SkillMap/VennDiagram.tsx:        if (activeCategories.includes(us.type as SkillCategory)) {

temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:  const { isMobile } = useBreakpoint();
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'all' | 'unread' | 'read'>('all');
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:  const filteredNotifications = filter === 'all' 
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    ? notifications 
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    : filter === 'unread'
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      ? notifications.filter(n => !n.read)
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      : notifications.filter(n => n.read);
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    const groups: Record<string, Notification[]> = {
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      'Hoy': [],
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      'Ayer': [],
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      'Anteriores': []
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    };
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    filteredNotifications.forEach(n => {
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      const date = new Date(n.createdAt);
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      if (isToday(date)) groups['Hoy'].push(n);
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      else if (isYesterday(date)) groups['Ayer'].push(n);
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      else groups['Anteriores'].push(n);
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    // Sort each group so unread notifications appear first
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    Object.keys(groups).forEach(key => {
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      groups[key].sort((a, b) => {
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:        if (a.read === b.read) {
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:          return new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime();
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:        }
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:        return a.read ? 1 : -1;
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:      });
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:    return groups;
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:  }, [filteredNotifications]);
temp_repo/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx:

temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const [dragCounter, setDragCounter] = React.useState(0);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const isCompact = layout === 'mobile';
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const handleDragEnter = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    setDragCounter(prev => prev + 1);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    setIsOver(true);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const handleDragOver = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    if (onDragOver) {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      onDragOver(e);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const handleDragLeave = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    setDragCounter(prev => {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      const newCount = prev - 1;
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      if (newCount <= 0) {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:        setIsOver(false);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:        return 0;
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      }
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      return newCount;
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const handleDrop = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    setDragCounter(0);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    setIsOver(false);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    if (onDrop) {

temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:

temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    return acc + (isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  }, 0);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const totalEffort = tasks.reduce((acc, t) => {

temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    return acc + (isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  }, 0);
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  const isApproval = column.id === 'pending_approval';
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:  return (
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:    <div 
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      onDragEnter={handleDragEnter}
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanColumn.tsx:      onDragOver={handleDragOver}

temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:  const scroll = (direction: 'left' | 'right') => {
temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:    if (scrollRef.current) {
temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:      const { scrollLeft, clientWidth } = scrollRef.current;

temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:      scrollRef.current.scrollTo({ left: scrollTo, behavior: 'smooth' });
temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/stages/StagePipeline.tsx:  };

temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:    const totalTasks = tasks.length;
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:    const progress = totalTasks > 0 ? Math.round((doneTasks / totalTasks) * 100) : 0;

temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:      const val = parseFloat(t.estimatedSP);
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:      return acc + (isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:    }, 0);
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:    const doneSP = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'done').reduce((acc, t) => {
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:      const val = parseFloat(t.estimatedSP);
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:      return acc + (isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
temp_repo/src/components/StageEditor.tsx:    }, 0);

temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const taskMap = new Map(tasks.map(t => [t.id, t]));
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const getLayer = (id: string): number => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      if (layers[id] !== undefined) return layers[id];
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const task = taskMap.get(id);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      if (!task || !task.dependencies || task.dependencies.length === 0) {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        layers[id] = 0;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        return 0;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      }
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const depLayers = task.dependencies.map(depId => getLayer(depId));
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const layer = Math.max(...depLayers) + 1;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      layers[id] = layer;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      return layer;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    };
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    tasks.forEach(t => getLayer(t.id));
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const layerCounts: { [key: number]: number } = {};
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    return tasks.map(t => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const layer = layers[t.id] || 0;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const index = layerCounts[layer] || 0;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      layerCounts[layer] = index + 1;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      return {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        ...t,
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        x: t.x ?? (layer * (NW + 100) + 60),
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        y: t.y ?? (index * (NH + 60) + 60)
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      };
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  }, [tasks]);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  const handleMouseDown = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    if ((e.target as Element).closest('[data-task-id]')) return;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    setIsPanning(true);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    setStartPos({ x: e.clientX - transform.x, y: e.clientY - transform.y });
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  const handleMouseMove = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    if (!isPanning) return;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    setTransform(prev => ({
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      ...prev,
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      x: e.clientX - startPos.x,
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      y: e.clientY - startPos.y
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    }));
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  const handleMouseUp = () => setIsPanning(false);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  const handleWheel = (e: React.WheelEvent) => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const scaleFactor = e.deltaY < 0 ? 1.1 : 0.9;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const newScale = Math.min(2.5, Math.max(0.2, transform.scale * scaleFactor));
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    if (svgRef.current) {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const rect = svgRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const mx = e.clientX - rect.left;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      const my = e.clientY - rect.top;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      setTransform(prev => ({
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        scale: newScale,
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        x: mx - scaleFactor * (mx - prev.x),
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:        y: my - scaleFactor * (my - prev.y)
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      }));
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:  };

temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const height = maxY - minY;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const scaleX = rect.width / width;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const scaleY = rect.height / height;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:    const newScale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, 1) * 0.9;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:

temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMNetwork.tsx:      scale: newScale,

temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:interface CPMResourceHistogramProps {

temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:export const CPMResourceHistogram: React.FC<CPMResourceHistogramProps> = ({ 
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  tasks, 
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  projectDuration,
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  isDarkMode
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:}) => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  const loadPerDay = React.useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:    const load = new Array(Math.ceil(projectDuration) + 1).fill(0);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:    tasks.forEach(task => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      const start = Math.floor(task.earlyStart || 0);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      const end = Math.ceil(task.earlyFinish || 0);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      const effortPerDay = (task.effort || 0) / (task.duration || 1);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      for (let d = start; d < end; d++) {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:        if (d < load.length) {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:          load[d] += effortPerDay;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:        }
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      }
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:    return load;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  }, [tasks, projectDuration]);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  const maxLoad = Math.max(...loadPerDay, 1);
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  const H = 160;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:  return (
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:          Distribución del esfuerzo (persona-día) a lo largo del tiempo.
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:        </p>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:            {loadPerDay.map((load, day) => {
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:              const height = (load / maxLoad) * H;
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:              const isOverload = load > 5; // Arbitrary threshold for visual feedback
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:              
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:              return (
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                <div 
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                  key={day} 
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                >
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                    {load > 0 && (
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                      <div 
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                        style={{ height: `${height}px` }}
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                      />
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                    )}
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                  </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                  
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                  {/* Tooltip on hover */}
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                      {load.toFixed(1)} p·d
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                    </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                  </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:                </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:              );
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:            })}
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:          </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:        </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:      </div>
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/cpm/CPMResourceHistogram.tsx:        </div>

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:import React, { useMemo } from 'react';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:import { motion } from 'motion/react';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:import { Clock, CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, Info, Zap } from 'lucide-react';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:interface Stage {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  id: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  name: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  startDate: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  endDate: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:}
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:interface Task {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  id: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  status: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  stageId: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  estimatedSP?: number;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:}
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:interface ProjectProgressAnalysisProps {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  project: {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    id: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    name: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    startDate: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    endDate: string;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    stages: Stage[];
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  };
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  tasks: Task[];
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  isDarkMode: boolean;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:}
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:const ProjectProgressAnalysis: React.FC<ProjectProgressAnalysisProps> = ({ project, tasks, isDarkMode }) => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:  const analysis = useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (!project) return null;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const stages = project.stages || [];
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    // Derive project start/end from stages if not present
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let startStr = project.startDate;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let endStr = project.endDate;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    // Fallback dates for mockup if missing
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (!startStr && (!stages || stages.length === 0)) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const d = new Date();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      d.setDate(d.getDate() - 26); // 26 days ago
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      startStr = d.toISOString();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (!endStr && (!stages || stages.length === 0)) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const d = new Date();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      d.setDate(d.getDate() + 10); // 10 days from now
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      endStr = d.toISOString();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (!startStr && stages.length > 0) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const startDates = stages.map(s => new Date(s.startDate).getTime()).filter(t => !isNaN(t));
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      if (startDates.length > 0) startStr = new Date(Math.min(...startDates)).toISOString();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (!endStr && stages.length > 0) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const endDates = stages.map(s => new Date(s.endDate).getTime()).filter(t => !isNaN(t));
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      if (endDates.length > 0) endStr = new Date(Math.max(...endDates)).toISOString();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (!startStr || !endStr) return null;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const now = new Date();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const start = new Date(startStr);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const end = new Date(endStr);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const totalTime = end.getTime() - start.getTime();
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const elapsed = Math.max(0, Math.min(totalTime, now.getTime() - start.getTime()));
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const timeProgress = totalTime > 0 ? (elapsed / totalTime) * 100 : 0;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const totalDays = Math.ceil(totalTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const elapsedDays = Math.ceil(elapsed / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    // Task progress (weighted by SP if available, otherwise count)
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const totalTasks = tasks.length || 22; // Fallback for mockup
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const doneTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'done').length || 9; // Fallback for mockup
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const totalSP = tasks.reduce((acc, t) => acc + (Number(t.estimatedSP) || 0), 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const doneSP = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'done').reduce((acc, t) => acc + (Number(t.estimatedSP) || 0), 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const taskProgress = totalSP > 0 ? (doneSP / totalSP) * 100 : (totalTasks > 0 ? (doneTasks / totalTasks) * 100 : 41); // 41% fallback
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const gap = taskProgress - timeProgress;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let riskStatus = 'En ritmo';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let riskColor = 'text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/20';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let interpretation = 'El proyecto avanza según lo planificado.';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let action = 'Mantener el ritmo actual y monitorear hitos próximos.';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let riskLevel = 'Bajo';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (gap < -15) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      riskStatus = 'Atraso detectado';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      riskColor = 'text-red-500 bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      interpretation = 'El tiempo corre más rápido que la ejecución';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      action = 'Repriorizar tareas críticas y reducir bloqueos';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      riskLevel = 'Riesgo medio-alto';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    } else if (gap < -5) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      riskStatus = 'Atención requerida';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      riskColor = 'text-amber-500 bg-amber-500/10 border-amber-500/20';

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    } else if (gap > 10) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      riskStatus = 'Adelantado';

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    // Stage breakdown fallback for mockup if empty
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    let finalStages = stages;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    if (stages.length === 0) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      finalStages = [
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        { id: 's1', name: 'Diagnóstico inicial', startDate: new Date(start.getTime()).toISOString(), endDate: new Date(start.getTime() + 10 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() },

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        { id: 's3', name: 'Taller participativo', startDate: new Date(start.getTime() + 23 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), endDate: new Date(start.getTime() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() },

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:    const stageBreakdown = finalStages.map(stage => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const stageTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.stageId === stage.id);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sTotal = stageTasks.length;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sDone = stageTasks.filter(t => t.status === 'done').length;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sTotalSP = stageTasks.reduce((acc, t) => acc + (Number(t.estimatedSP) || 0), 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sDoneSP = stageTasks.filter(t => t.status === 'done').reduce((acc, t) => acc + (Number(t.estimatedSP) || 0), 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      let sProgress = sTotalSP > 0 ? (sDoneSP / sTotalSP) * 100 : (sTotal > 0 ? (sDone / sTotal) * 100 : 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      // Mockup values for empty stages
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      if (stages.length === 0) {

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sStart = new Date(stage.startDate);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sEnd = new Date(stage.endDate);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sTotalTime = sEnd.getTime() - sStart.getTime();

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sTimeProgress = sTotalTime > 0 ? (sElapsed / sTotalTime) * 100 : 0;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      const sGap = sProgress - sTimeProgress;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      let sStatus = 'En ritmo';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      let sStatusColor = 'text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/10';

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      if (sGap < -10) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        sStatus = 'Atención';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        sStatusColor = 'text-amber-500 bg-amber-500/10';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      } else if (sGap > 10) {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        sStatus = 'Adelantado';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        sStatusColor = 'text-indigo-500 bg-indigo-500/10';
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      } else if (now < sStart) {

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      return {

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        progress: Math.round(sProgress),

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:        statusColor: sStatusColor
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectProgressAnalysis.tsx:      };

temp_repo/src/components/Login.tsx:      } else if (error.code === 'auth/popup-closed-by-user') {

temp_repo/src/components/Login.tsx:    } finally {

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:const ProjectDashboard = ({ tasks, projectId, project, students, isDarkMode }: any) => {

temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    project?.stages?.[project?.currentStageIndex || 0]?.id || 'all'
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:  );
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:  const filteredTasks = useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    if (selectedStageId === 'all') return tasks;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    return tasks.filter((t: any) => t.stageId === selectedStageId);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:  }, [tasks, selectedStageId]);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:  const stats = useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const total = filteredTasks.length;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const done = filteredTasks.filter((t: any) => t.status === 'done').length;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const critical = filteredTasks.filter((t: any) => t.isCritical).length;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const progress = total > 0 ? Math.round((done / total) * 100) : 0;
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const totalSP = filteredTasks.reduce((acc: number, t: any) => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:      const val = parseFloat(t.estimatedSP);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:      return acc + (isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    }, 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const doneSP = filteredTasks.filter((t: any) => t.status === 'done').reduce((acc: number, t: any) => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:      const val = parseFloat(t.estimatedSP);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:      return acc + (isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    }, 0);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    return { total, done, critical, progress, totalSP, doneSP };
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:  }, [filteredTasks]);
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:  const statusData = useMemo(() => {
temp_repo/src/components/ProjectDashboard.tsx:    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};

temp_repo/src/components/KanbanCard.tsx:        ${isPending ? (isDarkMode ? 'border-amber-500/30 bg-amber-500/5' : 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/30') : ''}
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanCard.tsx:      `}
temp_repo/src/components/KanbanCard.tsx:    >

temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:export interface FirestoreErrorInfo {

temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  operationType: OperationType;
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  path: string | null;
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  authInfo: {

temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    email: string | null | undefined;

temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  const errorCode = (error as any)?.code;
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  // Ignore permission-denied errors if the user is logged out (e.g., during sign out)
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  if ((errorCode === 'permission-denied' || errorMessage.includes('Missing or insufficient permissions')) && !auth.currentUser) {
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    console.warn(`Ignored permission-denied error during ${operationType} on ${path} because user is logged out.`);
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    return;
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    error: errorMessage,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    authInfo: {
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:        providerId: provider.providerId,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:        displayName: provider.displayName,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:        email: provider.email,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:      })) || []
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    },
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    operationType,
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:    path
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:}
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:
temp_repo/src/firebase.ts:export default app;
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:export function formatName(firstName: string = '', lastName: string = ''): string {
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  if (!firstName) return 'Sin asignar';
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  const initial = lastName ? ` ${lastName.charAt(0)}.` : '';
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  return `${firstName}${initial}`;
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:}
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:export function formatFullName(fullName?: string): string {
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  if (!fullName || fullName === 'Usuario' || fullName === 'Sistema') return fullName || 'Usuario';
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  const parts = fullName.trim().split(/\s+/);
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  if (parts.length < 2) return fullName;
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  const firstName = parts[0];
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  const lastName = parts[parts.length - 1]; // Use last part as last name
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:  return `${firstName} ${lastName.charAt(0)}.`;
temp_repo/src/utils/formatters.ts:}

temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:// Regla 1: las fechas de etapas deben estar dentro del rango del proyecto
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:export function validateStageDates(
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  stages: Stage[],
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  projectStart: string | null,
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  projectEnd: string | null
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:): string[] {
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  const errors: string[] = []
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  if (!projectStart || !projectEnd) return errors
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  stages.forEach(stage => {
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    if (stage.startDate && stage.startDate < projectStart) {
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:      errors.push(`"${stage.name}": inicio antes del inicio del proyecto`)
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    if (stage.endDate && stage.endDate > projectEnd) {
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:      errors.push(`"${stage.name}": fin después del fin del proyecto`)
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    if (stage.startDate && stage.endDate && stage.startDate > stage.endDate) {
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:      errors.push(`"${stage.name}": fecha de inicio posterior al fin`)
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  })
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  return errors
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:}

temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:// Regla 2: las fechas de tareas deben estar dentro de su etapa (advertencia)
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:export function warnTaskOutsideStage(
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  task: Task,
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  stage: Stage
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:): boolean {
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  if (!stage.startDate || !stage.endDate || !task.startDate || !task.endDate) return false

temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    task.startDate < stage.startDate ||
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    task.endDate   > stage.endDate
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  )

temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:// Regla 3: los sprints deben estar dentro de las fechas del proyecto
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:export function validateSprintDates(

temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:  project: Project
temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:): string[] {

temp_repo/src/utils/dateValidation.ts:    errors.push('El sprint termina después del fin del proyecto')

temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:export function dedupeById<T extends { id: string }>(items: T[]): T[] {
temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:  const map = new Map<string, T>();
temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:  for (const item of items) {
temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:    map.set(item.id, item);
temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:  return Array.from(map.values());
temp_repo/src/utils/dedupe.ts:}
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:import { toast } from 'react-hot-toast';
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:import { Task } from '../types/criticalPath';
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:export function computeCriticalPath(tasks: Task[]): Task[] {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  // 1. Build graph and calculate durations
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const graph: { [key: string]: string[] } = {};
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const reverseGraph: { [key: string]: string[] } = {};
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const taskMap: { [key: string]: Task } = {};
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  tasks.forEach(t => {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    taskMap[t.id] = { ...t };
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    graph[t.id] = t.dependencies || [];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    if (!reverseGraph[t.id]) reverseGraph[t.id] = [];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    (t.dependencies || []).forEach((depId: string) => {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      if (!reverseGraph[depId]) reverseGraph[depId] = [];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      reverseGraph[depId].push(t.id);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    });
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    // Calculate duration in days if not present
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    if (t.startDate && t.endDate) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      const start = new Date(t.startDate).getTime();
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      const end = new Date(t.endDate).getTime();
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      taskMap[t.id].duration = Math.max(1, Math.ceil((end - start) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)));
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    } else {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      taskMap[t.id].duration = 1; // Default 1 day
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  });
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  // 2. Cycle detection (DFS)
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const visited: { [key: string]: number } = {}; // 0: unvisited, 1: visiting, 2: visited
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const cyclePath: string[] = [];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  function hasCycle(nodeId: string, path: string[]): boolean {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    if (visited[nodeId] === 1) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      cyclePath.push(...path.slice(path.indexOf(nodeId)), nodeId);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      return true;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    if (visited[nodeId] === 2) return false;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    visited[nodeId] = 1;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    path.push(nodeId);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    for (const depId of graph[nodeId] || []) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      if (taskMap[depId] && hasCycle(depId, path)) return true;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    path.pop();
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    visited[nodeId] = 2;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    return false;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  for (const taskId of Object.keys(taskMap)) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    if (!visited[taskId]) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      if (hasCycle(taskId, [])) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        const titles = cyclePath.map(id => taskMap[id]?.title || id).join(' → ');
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        toast.error(`Ciclo detectado entre tareas: ${titles}`);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        return tasks; // Return original if cycle
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  // 3. Forward Pass (Calculate ES, EF)
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const topoOrder: string[] = [];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const inDegree: { [key: string]: number } = {};
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  Object.keys(taskMap).forEach(id => {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    inDegree[id] = (graph[id] || []).filter(depId => taskMap[depId]).length;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  });
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const queue: string[] = Object.keys(inDegree).filter(id => inDegree[id] === 0);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  while (queue.length > 0) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    const currentId = queue.shift()!;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    topoOrder.push(currentId);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    const task = taskMap[currentId];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    let maxEF = 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    (graph[currentId] || []).forEach(depId => {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      if (taskMap[depId] && (taskMap[depId].earlyFinish || 0) > maxEF) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        maxEF = taskMap[depId].earlyFinish || 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    });
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    task.earlyStart = maxEF;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    task.earlyFinish = task.earlyStart + (task.duration || 1);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    (reverseGraph[currentId] || []).forEach(nextId => {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      if (taskMap[nextId]) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        inDegree[nextId]--;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        if (inDegree[nextId] === 0) queue.push(nextId);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    });
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  // 4. Backward Pass (Calculate LS, LF)
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  const projectDuration = Math.max(...Object.values(taskMap).map(t => t.earlyFinish || 0));
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  for (let i = topoOrder.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    const currentId = topoOrder[i];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    const task = taskMap[currentId];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    let minLS = projectDuration;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    const successors = reverseGraph[currentId] || [];
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    if (successors.length > 0) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      let hasValidSuccessor = false;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      successors.forEach(nextId => {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        if (taskMap[nextId]) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:          hasValidSuccessor = true;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:          if ((taskMap[nextId].lateStart ?? projectDuration) < minLS) {
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:            minLS = taskMap[nextId].lateStart ?? projectDuration;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:          }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:        }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      });
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:      if (!hasValidSuccessor) minLS = projectDuration;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    task.lateFinish = minLS;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    task.lateStart = task.lateFinish - (task.duration || 1);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    task.slack = task.lateStart - (task.earlyStart || 0);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:    task.isCritical = task.slack === 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  }
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:  return Object.values(taskMap);
temp_repo/src/utils/criticalPath.ts:}
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:import { SkillRating, SkillCategory } from '../types/skills';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:import { SKILL_CATEGORIES } from '../constants/skills';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:export interface CategoryStats {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  id: SkillCategory;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  name: string;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  userValue: number;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  referenceValue: number;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  gap: number;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  color: string;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:}
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:export interface SkillComparison {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  name: string;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  category: SkillCategory;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  userValue: number;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  referenceValue: number;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  gap: number;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  level: 'vacio' | 'bajo' | 'medio' | 'alto';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:}
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:export const getSkillLevel = (value: number): 'vacio' | 'bajo' | 'medio' | 'alto' => {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  if (value === 0) return 'vacio';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  if (value <= 33) return 'bajo';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  if (value <= 66) return 'medio';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  return 'alto';
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:};
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:export const calculateSkillComparison = (
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  userSkills: SkillRating[],
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  referenceSkills: SkillRating[]
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:): SkillComparison[] => {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  const allSkillNames = Array.from(new Set([
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    ...userSkills.map(s => s.name),
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    ...referenceSkills.map(s => s.name)
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  ]));
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  return allSkillNames.map(name => {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const userSkill = userSkills.find(s => s.name === name);
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const refSkill = referenceSkills.find(s => s.name === name);
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const userValue = userSkill?.value || 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const referenceValue = refSkill?.value || 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const category = (userSkill?.type || refSkill?.type || 'soft') as SkillCategory;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    return {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      name,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      category,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      userValue,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      referenceValue,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      gap: userValue - referenceValue,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      level: getSkillLevel(userValue)
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    };
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  }).sort((a, b) => b.userValue - a.userValue);
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:};
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:export const calculateCategoryStats = (
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  userSkills: SkillRating[],
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  referenceSkills: SkillRating[]
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:): CategoryStats[] => {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  return SKILL_CATEGORIES.map(cat => {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const userCatSkills = userSkills.filter(s => s.type === cat.id);
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const refCatSkills = referenceSkills.filter(s => s.type === cat.id);
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const userAvg = userCatSkills.length > 0 
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      ? userCatSkills.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.value, 0) / userCatSkills.length 
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      : 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    const refAvg = refCatSkills.length > 0 
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      ? refCatSkills.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.value, 0) / refCatSkills.length 
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      : 0;
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    return {
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      id: cat.id as SkillCategory,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      name: cat.name,
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      userValue: Math.round(userAvg),
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      referenceValue: Math.round(refAvg),
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      gap: Math.round(userAvg - refAvg),
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:      color: cat.color
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:    };
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:  });
temp_repo/src/utils/skillAnalysis.ts:};

temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:export function detectResourceType(url: string): ResourceType {
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  const lowerUrl = url.toLowerCase();
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('drive.google.com'))  return 'drive';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('docs.google.com/document')) return 'docs';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('docs.google.com/spreadsheets')) return 'sheets';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('canva.com'))         return 'canva';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('onedrive.live.com') || lowerUrl.includes('sharepoint.com')) return 'onedrive';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('figma.com'))         return 'figma';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('notion.so'))         return 'notion';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('youtube.com') || lowerUrl.includes('youtu.be')) return 'youtube';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  if (lowerUrl.includes('github.com'))        return 'github';
temp_repo/src/config/resourceTypes.ts:  return 'link';

temp_repo/src/App.tsx:  const handleDeleteProject = async (projectId: string) => {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    if (!projectId) {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      toast.error('Error: ID de proyecto no encontrado');
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      return;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    const project = projects.find(p => p.id === projectId);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    if (!project) {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      toast.error('Error: Proyecto no encontrado en el estado local');
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      return;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    }
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    try {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 1. Get project admins for notification
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const admins = await getProjectAdmins(projectId);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 2. Delete the project document
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'projects', projectId));
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 3. Delete associated tasks
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const tasksRef = collection(db, 'projects', projectId, 'tasks');
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const tasksSnapshot = await getDocs(tasksRef);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 4. Delete associated resources
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const resourcesRef = collection(db, 'projects', projectId, 'resources');
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const resourcesSnapshot = await getDocs(resourcesRef);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 5. Delete associated deletedTasks
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const deletedTasksRef = collection(db, 'projects', projectId, 'deletedTasks');
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const deletedTasksSnapshot = await getDocs(deletedTasksRef);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // Use batches to delete tasks, resources and deletedTasks (handling the 500 limit)
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const allDocsToDelete = [
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        ...tasksSnapshot.docs, 
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        ...resourcesSnapshot.docs,
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        ...deletedTasksSnapshot.docs
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      ];
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < allDocsToDelete.length; i += 500) {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        const batch = writeBatch(db);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        const chunk = allDocsToDelete.slice(i, i + 500);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        chunk.forEach(doc => batch.delete(doc.ref));
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        await batch.commit();
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      }
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 5. Update local state
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      setProjects(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== projectId));
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      // 6. Notify admins
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const currentUserProfile = students.find(s => s.id === user?.uid) || { 
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        firstName: 'Usuario', 
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        lastNamePaterno: 'Desconocido', 
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        uid: user?.uid || '' 
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      };
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      for (const admin of admins) {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        // Only notify others, not self
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        if (admin.uid !== user?.uid) {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:          await notifyProjectDeleted(admin.uid, project, currentUserProfile);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:        }

temp_repo/src/App.tsx:  const checkTimeOverlap = (studentId: string, date: string, startTime: string, endTime: string, ignoreRecordId = null) => {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    if (!studentId || !startTime || !endTime) return false;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    const student = students.find(s => s.id === studentId);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    if (!student) return false;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    const newStart = toMins(startTime);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    const newEnd = toMins(endTime);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    return (student?.records || []).some((record: any) => {
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      if (record.id === ignoreRecordId) return false;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      if (record.date !== date) return false;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      if (!record.startTime || !record.endTime) return false;
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const recStart = toMins(record.startTime);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      const recEnd = toMins(record.endTime);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:      return (newStart < recEnd && newEnd > recStart);
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:    });
temp_repo/src/App.tsx:  };
